title: teucrium pilosum
intro: Teucrium pilosum, also known as woolly germander, is a perennial plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Teucrium pilosum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities, which can help in treating various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Teucrium pilosum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
